revision.comment: adding tracking cat
1 revision imported: impoting nglish ikipdia tmplats
Adding [[Category:pages from wikipedia]][[en:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages from wikipedia]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Undo revision [[Special:Diff/219241|219241]] by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]])
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: unused template redirect
Text replacement - "{subst:PAGENAME}" to "{{subst:PAGENAME}}"
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contributions/Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) to last revision by [[User:en>Primefac|en>Primefac]]
Bot: redirect unused template to en:

Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Blanked the page
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.text: <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
